policies.title: Recall Marketplace Enforcement Policy
policies.body: Active marketplace listings for recalled products must be removed. An investigator may create a violation record and draft a seller notice when product recall evidence and an active listing are present. Sending the seller notice is an external side-effect action and requires supervisor approval. Escalating a case also requires supervisor approval. Every action must be logged with case ID, listing ID, seller ID, policy citation, tool call, and idempotency key.

policies.title: Seller Communication Standard
policies.body: Seller notices must include product name, recall identifier, listing URL, required action, response deadline, and policy citation. The notice must not be sent until approval is recorded. Follow-up should be scheduled for five business days after notice creation.

cases.summary: Check whether Market Blue is still selling recalled RX-900 Smart Blender.
HomeHub removed recalled RX-900 listing; monitor for recurrence.
